_meta.description: SkyNova Airlines — MongoDB seed data. customer_id and booking_reference values cross-reference data/supabase_seed.sql. Datetimes are ISO-8601 strings; the loader script (load_mongodb.py) converts them to BSON Date.

support_tickets.subject: Refund for cancelled flight SN301 (BOM-SIN)

messages.text: My flight SN301 on 25 April was cancelled at the airport with no rebooking offered. I want a full refund to my original card.
Apologies for the disruption, Liam. Initiating refund per cancellation policy. Please allow 7-10 business days.
It's been over a week. Still no refund visible. Please escalate.

support_tickets.subject: SN301 cancellation - rebooked on SN302 + compensation request
support_tickets.resolution: Rebooked on SN302 same cabin (Business). Issued $200 travel voucher.

messages.text: Stuck at BOM after SN301 cancellation. Need same-day rebooking and compensation for hotel and missed meeting.
Rebooked on SN302 departing 21:30. Upgraded back to Business in same fare class.
Voucher SKY-VCH-882001 issued for USD 200. Resolved.

support_tickets.subject: Lack of communication when SN301 was cancelled
support_tickets.resolution: Acknowledged process gap. 5,000 SkyNova miles credited as goodwill.

messages.text: I was not informed about SN301 cancellation until I reached the airport. Found out from the agent at the gate. Unacceptable.
We sincerely apologise. Our SMS gateway had an outage that morning. Issued 5,000 miles to your account.

support_tickets.subject: Disputing NoShow status on SN401 - check-in app crashed

messages.text: I was at the gate at DEL but the SkyNova mobile app would not load my boarding pass. Counter agent told me boarding had closed. Marked NoShow but I was physically present.
Investigating with the airport ops team. Pulling CCTV from gate area to confirm presence.
Any update? My ticket value was 980 USD and you marked me NoShow.

support_tickets.subject: SN401 delay caused missed connection at JFK
support_tickets.resolution: 15,000 SkyNova miles + USD 150 meal voucher issued.

messages.text: SN401 was delayed 2hrs. I missed my onward Boston connection on a partner airline. Had to overnight at JFK at my own cost.
Verified ATC delay on departure. Eligible for compensation under our delay policy as you are a Silver tier member.
Issued 15,000 miles and a USD 150 meal voucher. Hotel reimbursement requires receipts - please reply with attachments.

support_tickets.subject: Baggage delivered 36hrs late after SN401 delay
support_tickets.resolution: Bag located and delivered. USD 100 essentials reimbursement approved.

messages.text: Bag did not arrive at JFK with SN401. Need clothes and toiletries reimbursement.
Bag delivered to your hotel 03 May 18:00. Reimbursement of USD 100 approved per policy.

support_tickets.subject: Missing miles for SN101/SN102 round trip

messages.text: I flew SN101 on 15 April and SN102 on 17 April in Business. Miles for both segments are still missing from my Platinum account.
Raised with loyalty backoffice. Bookings confirmed flown. ETA to credit: 5-7 business days.
Still nothing credited. Following up.

support_tickets.subject: Seat selection for SN601 (DEL-NRT)
support_tickets.resolution: Seat changed from 7B to 7A (window) at no charge.

messages.text: Can I switch from middle seat 7B to a window? Long flight, would help.
Done. New seat 7A. Confirmation emailed.

support_tickets.subject: Wheelchair assistance request for SN801 (BOM-DXB) on 20 May

messages.text: Travelling with my mother who needs wheelchair from kerbside to gate. Booking SKYA4H5KF.
Logged WCHR request with BOM ground services. Confirmation 24hrs prior to departure.

support_tickets.subject: Special meal: vegetarian, no nuts - SN601
support_tickets.resolution: VGML with no-nuts notation added to PNR. Galley briefed.

messages.text: Severe nut allergy. Need vegetarian meal with absolutely no nuts on SN601 First Class.
Done. VGML loaded with allergy flag. Cabin crew will be notified at briefing.

support_tickets.subject: Damaged baggage on arrival from SN102

messages.text: Suitcase handle was snapped off when I collected at DEL. Reported at the baggage desk, given reference DEL-BAG-22884.
Claim filed. Please share photos and original purchase receipt for valuation.
Photos and receipt attached. Bag was 250 GBP from John Lewis.
Received. Forwarded to claims for assessment, expect outcome within 14 days.

support_tickets.subject: Cancellation fee dispute - booking made within 24hr window
support_tickets.resolution: Confirmed booking cancelled within 24hrs of issue. Fee waived per policy.

messages.text: I cancelled within 24hrs of booking but you charged me a 50 GBP fee. Pretty sure that's against your own policy.
You are correct. Fee refunded to original card. Apologies for the error.

support_tickets.subject: Lost item - blue jacket left in seat pocket on SN401

messages.text: I left a navy blue Patagonia jacket in seat 33B on SN401 (DEL-JFK 01 May). Please check lost and found.
Aircraft VT-SNE has been on rotation. Cleaning crew at JFK had no log. Checking BOM cleaning records next.

support_tickets.subject: Upgrade voucher not honoured at check-in
support_tickets.resolution: Counter agent error. Voucher reinstated. 10,000 miles goodwill.

messages.text: Tried to use my Gold tier upgrade voucher at BOM check-in for SN501. Agent said it had expired - but valid till August per my account.
Voucher status verified valid. Counter agent referenced wrong record. Voucher reinstated, 10,000 miles credited.

support_tickets.subject: Wifi did not work entire SN501 flight
support_tickets.resolution: Confirmed wifi outage on tail VT-SND that day. 5,000 miles credited.

messages.text: Paid for premium wifi on SN501 BOM-CDG, never connected. Six hour flight without internet.
System logs confirm outage. Wifi fee refunded plus 5,000 miles for inconvenience.

support_tickets.subject: Lounge access denied at JFK despite Platinum status
support_tickets.resolution: Lounge staff system was offline. Coached. Apology issued.

messages.text: Showed up at the SkyNova partner lounge JFK Terminal 4 for SN402. Was turned away despite my Platinum card. Embarrassing.
Lounge eligibility system was offline at the time. Apologies. Sent feedback to partner. Issued you a guest lounge pass for next visit.

support_tickets.subject: Travelling with small dog - need fees and crate specs
support_tickets.resolution: Provided fees and approved crate dimensions. Customer to confirm 48hrs prior.

messages.text: I have a 6kg Shih Tzu. Can he travel in cabin on SN601 to NRT? What's the fee?
Yes, in-cabin pet allowed up to 8kg total (pet+carrier). Fee USD 125 per segment. Carrier max dims 43 x 30 x 19 cm soft-sided. Confirm 48hrs prior with vet certificate.

support_tickets.subject: Vegetarian meal not loaded on SN102

messages.text: Pre-ordered VGML on SN102 LHR-DEL. Crew said no veg meal loaded. Had to eat the bread roll.
Catering record shows VGML was ordered but not loaded due to a packing error. 3,000 miles credited.

support_tickets.subject: Request to waive change fee for date change

messages.text: Need to change return SN502 to a later date due to family emergency. Asking you to waive the change fee.

support_tickets.subject: Unaccompanied minor service for daughter on SN801

messages.text: My 11 year old will fly SN801 BOM-DXB on 20 May. Please arrange UM service. Pickup at DXB by her uncle.
UM form sent for signature. Service fee USD 100. Pickup contact must show ID matching name on form.

flight_reviews.title: Flawless Business cabin
flight_reviews.comment: Best Business class I've had in a year. Crew remembered my name on the second meal service.

flight_reviews.title: Solid eastbound
flight_reviews.comment: Entertainment library is dated. Otherwise very good.

flight_reviews.title: Premium Economy worth it
flight_reviews.comment: Comfortable seat, decent food. Crew very polite.

flight_reviews.title: Bag arrived broken
flight_reviews.comment: Flight itself was fine but my suitcase handle was snapped off on arrival. Filed a claim.

flight_reviews.title: Standard Economy
flight_reviews.comment: Got me there on time. Legroom is tight on the A350.

flight_reviews.title: OK return leg
flight_reviews.comment: Same as outbound. Nothing remarkable.

flight_reviews.title: Great crew
flight_reviews.comment: Crew went above and beyond when my screen wasn't working. Moved me to an empty row.

flight_reviews.title: No veg meal loaded
flight_reviews.comment: Pre-ordered VGML and they didn't have it. Hungry whole flight. SkyNova credited miles after I complained but please don't let this happen.

flight_reviews.title: Quick and smooth
flight_reviews.comment: Short hop, no IFE on the 737 but didn't matter. On time both ways.

flight_reviews.title: Fine
flight_reviews.comment: Slight delay on departure. Made it up in the air.

flight_reviews.title: First class on a short hop
flight_reviews.comment: Even on a 2.5hr 737 segment they treated First class properly. Excellent.

flight_reviews.title: Consistent
flight_reviews.comment: Same crew chief, same standard. Always my preferred carrier on this route.

flight_reviews.title: Good value
flight_reviews.comment: Cheaper than the legacy carriers and crew was super friendly.

flight_reviews.title: Sandwich was stale
flight_reviews.comment: Snack box could be better. Otherwise OK.

flight_reviews.title: Recovery flight after SN301 cancel
flight_reviews.comment: After my SN301 cancellation drama, the SN302 crew was a class apart. Made up for the bad start.

flight_reviews.title: 2hr delay killed my connection
flight_reviews.comment: Plane was nice. The 2 hour ATC delay cost me a hotel night at JFK and a missed onward flight. Compensation came eventually.

flight_reviews.title: Delay and lost item
flight_reviews.comment: Big delay, plus I left my jacket in the seat pocket and they still haven't found it. Crew was kind though.

flight_reviews.title: Business class softened the delay
flight_reviews.comment: Yes there was a 2hr delay. But Business cabin and crew were excellent. Lounge was a different story (separate complaint).

flight_reviews.title: Delay + bag lost = bad combo
flight_reviews.comment: Premium Economy was nice. But the delay plus losing my bag for 36 hours soured the whole trip.

flight_reviews.title: Long but ok
flight_reviews.comment: Delay was poorly communicated. Otherwise the flight itself was fine.

flight_reviews.title: Best westbound I've had
flight_reviews.comment: On time. Caviar service. Enough said.

flight_reviews.title: Recovered the trip
flight_reviews.comment: Outbound was rough but the return was excellent. Bumped my opinion back up.

flight_reviews.title: Better than outbound
flight_reviews.comment: On time at least. Economy meals could use work.

flight_reviews.title: Wifi never worked - paid for it!
flight_reviews.comment: Six hour flight. Bought wifi at boarding. It NEVER connected. They refunded after I complained but please test the system before charging people.

flight_reviews.title: Business class is fantastic
flight_reviews.comment: Lie-flat seat, fantastic Italian wine selection, attentive crew. Wifi was iffy though.

flight_reviews.title: Premium Economy good value
flight_reviews.comment: Crew very pleasant. IFE selection limited.

flight_reviews.title: Solid Economy
flight_reviews.comment: Got home on time. Crew memorable. Would fly again.
